verification_checks.human_verification: Zero-dependency Math sum puzzle captcha generator inside signup forms
verification_checks.hospital_security_verification: Blocked from creating missions via WhatsApp or Web until admin verifies profile KYC

roles_and_terminology.missionary: Field operators (students or civil society) claiming missions, confirming receipts, uploading invoice, distributing supplies
roles_and_terminology.provider: Commercial medical wholesalers claiming dispatch directly, skipping donor funding
roles_and_terminology.donor: International sponsors funding missions; supports 'is_anonymous' toggle
roles_and_terminology.admin: Platform supervisor reviewing pending profiles and validating compliance

privacy_and_security.anonymous_donor_masking: Public endpoints mask real donor names to 'Donante Anónimo'
privacy_and_security.receipts_and_transfer_isolation: Wallet receipts and bank transfers captures are stripped from public responses unless caller is Admin or the mission's assigned operator
